title: Default Backend for Unmatched Routes
description:
Configure an Ingress `defaultBackend` that catches all requests not matched by any rule, serving a custom 404 page.

Deploy a primary service for `/app` traffic and a `notfound-service` catch-all. The Ingress routes `/app` (Prefix) to the primary backend; everything else falls through to `defaultBackend`.

**Common Pitfalls**: `defaultBackend` is evaluated after all `spec.rules` fail — YAML order does not matter. The default backend Service must exist before the controller will accept the Ingress. `spec.defaultBackend` is a sibling of `spec.rules`, not nested inside it.
steps: Create a Deployment named app-deploy using image nginx:alpine to serve the main application
Create a ClusterIP Service named app-service on port 80 selecting app-deploy pods
Create a Deployment named notfound-deploy using image httpd:alpine to serve as the 404 handler
Create a ClusterIP Service named notfound-service on port 80 selecting notfound-deploy pods
Create an Ingress named default-backend-ingress with path rule /app (Prefix) → app-service and spec.defaultBackend pointing to notfound-service:80
hints: Use app: app-deploy and app: notfound-deploy as Pod labels — matchLabels, template labels, and Service selector must all use the same value
spec.defaultBackend is a sibling of spec.rules, not nested inside it
defaultBackend uses the same service/port structure as a rule backend
kubectl describe ingress shows 'Default backend: notfound-service:80' when configured correctly
Any path that does not start with /app (e.g. /about, /contact, /) will hit the default backend

editor_config.initial_code:
# Main application Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: # TODO: use 'app-deploy'
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: # TODO: use 'app-deploy'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: nginx:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: app-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: app-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
# 404 / default backend Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notfound-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: # TODO: use 'notfound-deploy'
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: # TODO: use 'notfound-deploy'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notfound
        image: # TODO: httpd:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notfound-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: notfound-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
# Ingress with defaultBackend
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: default-backend-ingress
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  defaultBackend:
    service:
      name: notfound-service
      port:
        number: 80
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /app
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: app-service
            port:
              number: 80

_solution.code_solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-deploy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: app-deploy
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: nginx:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: app-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: app-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notfound-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notfound-deploy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notfound-deploy
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notfound
        image: httpd:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notfound-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: notfound-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: default-backend-ingress
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  defaultBackend:
    service:
      name: notfound-service
      port:
        number: 80
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /app
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: app-service
            port:
              number: 80
_solution.validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

kubectl apply -f solution.yaml

kubectl rollout status deployment/app-deploy --timeout=60s
kubectl rollout status deployment/notfound-deploy --timeout=60s
echo "✓ Both Deployments are ready"

kubectl get service app-service > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ app-service exists" || { echo "✗ app-service not found"; exit 1; }
kubectl get service notfound-service > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ notfound-service exists" || { echo "✗ notfound-service not found"; exit 1; }

kubectl get ingress default-backend-ingress > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Ingress default-backend-ingress exists" || { echo "✗ Ingress not found"; exit 1; }

# Check defaultBackend
default_svc=$(kubectl get ingress default-backend-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.defaultBackend.service.name}')
if [ "$default_svc" = "notfound-service" ]; then
  echo "✓ defaultBackend points to notfound-service"
else
  echo "✗ defaultBackend service is '$default_svc', expected 'notfound-service'"
  exit 1
fi

# Check /app rule exists
paths=$(kubectl get ingress default-backend-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.rules[0].http.paths[*].path}')
if echo "$paths" | grep -q "/app"; then
  echo "✓ /app rule is defined"
else
  echo "✗ /app rule not found in spec.rules"
  exit 1
fi

# Check app-service is the backend for /app
rule_svc=$(kubectl get ingress default-backend-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.rules[0].http.paths[0].backend.service.name}')
if [ "$rule_svc" = "app-service" ]; then
  echo "✓ /app path routes to app-service"
else
  echo "✗ /app backend is '$rule_svc', expected 'app-service'"
  exit 1
fi

echo "✓ All validations passed"
exit 0
